documentation_layers.api: Generated signatures from current bindings and stubs
documentation_layers.architecture: Design rationale, research, and experimental direction

trust_rules: Compare since and last_verified metadata with the installed engine version.
Use generated API pages as the authority for current signatures.
Use api-changes.json only for recorded release-to-release structural differences; absence of a prior snapshot means compatibility is unknown.
Use Learn and Manual pages as the authority for recommended workflows.
Do not treat experimental architecture directions as shipped features without corroboration.
